scripts.build: pnpm --filter @routeiq/contracts build && pnpm --filter @routeiq/web build && pnpm --filter @routeiq/server build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @routeiq/contracts lint && pnpm --filter @routeiq/web lint && pnpm --filter @routeiq/server lint
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @routeiq/contracts typecheck && pnpm --filter @routeiq/web typecheck && pnpm --filter @routeiq/server typecheck
